title: THE IMPORTANCE OF INTRODUCING AN ADMINISTRATIVE RESTRICTION MEASURE IN THE FORM OF AN ADMINISTRATIVE BAN ON ATTENDING VENUES WHERE OFFICIAL SPORTS COMPETITIONS ARE HELD ON THE DAY THEY ARE CONDUCTED.
author: Abdullayev, Fayzulla
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article explores the importance of applying an administrative restriction measure in the manner of administrative Prohibition of arriving on the day they are held at official sporting events in relation to individuals who have violated public order at sporting events or urged the public to commit disorder, as well as advanced foreign experience in applying these restriction measures.
steps_raw: This article explores the importance of applying an administrative restriction measure in the manner of administrative Prohibition of arriving on the day they are held at official sporting events in relation to individuals who have violated public order at sporting events or urged the public to commit disorder, as well as advanced foreign experience in applying these restriction measures.
